risks.risk: Supabase free tier limits exceeded during development
risks.mitigation: Monitor usage dashboard, have Vercel + Upstash fallback ready, upgrade to Pro if needed ($25/mo)

risks.risk: PWA offline sync conflicts when multiple devices used
risks.mitigation: Implement timestamp-based conflict resolution, server-wins for critical data, notify user of conflicts

risks.risk: Battle engine client-side calculations exploitable by cheaters
risks.mitigation: Server-side validation of all battle results using deterministic seed, rate-limit battle completions, anomaly detection

risks.risk: Mobile performance issues on low-end devices
risks.mitigation: Implement quality settings (Low/Med/High), lazy loading, virtual scrolling, asset compression, WebP format

risks.risk: Original game owner claims IP infringement
risks.mitigation: All new assets, new name, new story, new code. Mechanics are not copyrightable. Document all original work.
Use commercial-safe AI models (Midjourney commercial plan, DALL-E 3), keep generation records, modify outputs significantly

risks.risk: Project scope creep - too many features requested
risks.mitigation: Strict MVP definition, phased delivery, feature freeze per phase, backlog for post-MVP ideas
Analytics from day one, A/B testing framework, player feedback channels, rapid iteration post-launch

risks.risk: Solo development bottleneck - Maciek as only human developer
risks.mitigation: Maximize AI-assisted development, modular architecture, comprehensive documentation, community contributions open

risks.risk: Data loss due to lack of backup strategy
risks.mitigation: Daily automated pg_dump to R2/S3, test restore monthly, schema in version control, point-in-time recovery enabled
Optimize build (tree shaking, code splitting), migrate to Vercel if limits hit, self-hosted runner option

risks.risk: Real-time features unreliable on poor mobile connections
risks.mitigation: Graceful degradation to polling, offline-first design, local state as source of truth, sync on reconnect

review_schedule: Weekly during active development, monthly post-launch
escalation_path: Maciek -> AI Developer -> External consultant (if needed)
